# LSMMapCreate(_:_:)

**Function**

Creates a new Latent Semantic Mapping map.

## Declaration

```swift
func LSMMapCreate(_ alloc: CFAllocator?, _ flags: CFOptionFlags) -> Unmanaged<LSMMap>
```

## Discussion

Call [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease] to dispose of the map.

## Creating a Map

- **Map Flags**: Options for creating a map.
